headline: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
summary: Sony revealed God of War Laufey at its State of Play showcase. Developed by Santa Monica Studio, it's coming exclusively to PS5. No release date has been announced yet.

headline: Remedy's Control sequel launches in September
summary: Control Resonant, Remedy's sequel, launches September 24th, 2026. The release date was revealed at PlayStation State of Play. The story will feature Dylan Faden, previously imprisoned.

headline: Here's seven bloody minutes of Wolverine on the PS5
summary: Marvel's Wolverine gameplay revealed at State of Play. Insomniac Games' title is a PS5 exclusive, out September 15th. Logan fights enemies in his iconic yellow outfit.

headline: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: Sony's State of Play showcase aired June 2nd, ahead of Summer Game Fest. It comes at a critical time for the PlayStation brand. The event covered new game announcements and trailers.

headline: Amazon's June Audible Deal Is Now Live: Get 3 Months for Just $0.99 Per Month
summary: Amazon is offering an Audible deal for June. New subscribers can get 3 months for $0.99 per month. Catch up on audiobooks from popular authors.

headline: Phantom Blade Zero Delay Moves Launch to Late October 2026
summary: Phantom Blade Zero's release date has been delayed. The game will now launch in late October 2026. The delay impacts both PC and PlayStation 5 versions.

headline: Save 66% Off a Used, Like New Pair of Beats Studio Pro Headphones on Amazon
summary: Get 66% off used, like-new Beats Studio Pro headphones. The $350 headphones are available for under $120. This deal is live on Amazon for noise-canceling headphones.

headline: Gabe Newell Says Players Have 'Enormous Choice' When Pressed on Steam Monopoly Accusations, Report Says
summary: Valve's Gabe Newell denied Steam monopoly claims. He stated PC gamers have 'enormous choice.' The report details his response to accusations.

headline: Henry Nowak arrest footage raises 'serious questions for police', PM says
summary: Henry Nowak arrest footage sparks 'serious questions' for police. PM calls for addressing accusations of racism in decision-making. Protesters clashed with police in Southampton following the events.

headline: Key moments from police bodycam footage
summary: BBC Verify analyzed police bodycam footage. The footage shows Henry Nowak after being stabbed. Vickrum Digwa is identified as the assailant.

headline: Three quarters of workers not on track for 'moderate' pension income, report suggests
summary: Most workers are unprepared for a moderate pension income. A moderate retirement lifestyle costs £32,700 for one person. For two people, it costs £45,400 annually, a new report suggests.

headline: US and Iran launch new strikes as ceasefire negotiations stalled
summary: US and Iran exchanged new strikes amidst stalled ceasefire talks. US targeted Iran and an oil tanker. Tehran claims it attacked US bases in the Gulf.
